props.name: href
props.description: Link — a styled inline text link rendered with a semantic `<a>`.  Violet and underlined by default (the brand selection colour), with a clear hover/focus treatment. Set `external` for links that open in a new tab — it adds `target="_blank"` + safe `rel`, and an arrow icon marks it visually. When no `href` is given it renders a non-navigating link (e.g. a disabled or JS-driven link) that is still keyboardable when an `onpress` is supplied.  Presentational only — themeable via `--ds-link-*`. / /** Destination URL.

props.name: external
props.description: Open in a new tab (adds target/rel and a trailing arrow icon).

props.name: variant
props.description: Tone down to the surrounding text colour (still underlined on hover).

props.name: onpress
props.description: Optional press handler (useful when there is no `href`).
